summary: Tested new modular routes (crews, safety, location), auction watchlist APIs, and hot badge functionality. Backend: 20/20 tests pass. Frontend: Auctions page loads correctly with auction cards, timers, and bid info. ISSUE: Watchlist eye icon button not visible on auction cards due to React Native Web rendering issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Watchlist eye icon button not visible on auction cards. Button is rendered but not appearing visually. Likely React Native Web z-index/positioning issue with TouchableOpacity inside TouchableOpacity.
attempted_fixes: Changed position from top:12 to top:48 to avoid timer overlap
ui_bugs.suggested_fix: Consider using a View wrapper with pointerEvents='box-none' or using Pressable instead of nested TouchableOpacity. The button code is correct but React Native Web may have issues with nested touchable components.

action_items: Fix watchlist eye icon visibility on auction cards - button is rendered but not visible
Hot badge (BIDDING WAR!) will only show when auction has 5+ bids in 5 minutes - currently no hot auctions to test visually
critical_code_review_comments: Watchlist button positioning conflicts with timer badge - both use absolute positioning in top-right area
Consider using Pressable instead of nested TouchableOpacity for better React Native Web compatibility

success_rate.frontend: 90% (Auctions page loads, cards display correctly, but watchlist button not visible)

seed_data_creation: N/A - used existing test user and seeded auctions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs for crews, safety, location, and auction watchlist all working correctly. Frontend watchlist button visibility issue needs to be fixed. The button code exists in auctions.tsx but is not rendering visibly on web. Hot badge will show 'BIDDING WAR!' when activity_level is 'hot' (5+ bids in 5 mins) - no hot auctions currently to test this visually.

mocked_apis.CherryHub: MOCKED - CherryHub membership API uses mock mode

crews_route.details: Full CRUD operations working with authentication

safety_route.details: Emergency services endpoint is public, other endpoints require auth

auction_watchlist.details: Watchlist CRUD and activity endpoint working. Returns is_hot and activity_level

hot_badge_ui.details: Code implemented in auctions.tsx but no hot auctions to test visually. Badge shows when activity_level is 'hot'

watchlist_ui.details: Eye icon button not visible on auction cards. Code exists but rendering issue on React Native Web
